## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build

## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm test:quick` or `pnpm verify`
- [ ] `pnpm test:rust` (non-IM)
- [ ] IM tests (`pnpm test:rust:im`) if messaging/network touched

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
- [ ] No large binaries or model weights under `allama/models/`
- [ ] License-compatible dependencies only
